title: code_graph_declare specification
description: Declarative specification for code_graph_declare. A spec produces a code_graph indistinguishable in shape from extractor output, with origin=declared on every def. The shape is uniform across languages; per-language profiles restrict only the kind and visibility enumerations.

root.description: Moniker of the root module of this declarative graph.

lang.description: Language tag. Selects the per-language profile that restricts kind and visibility enumerations.

symbols.description: Symbols declared by this spec. Each becomes a DefRecord with origin=declared.

edges.description: Edges declared by this spec. Each becomes a RefRecord. Edge alphabet is canonical (depends_on / calls / injects:provide / injects:require).

MonikerURI.description: Typed-segment URI of the form <scheme>+moniker://<project>/<kind>:<name>[/<kind>:<name>...][#<kind>:<name>[#<kind>:<name>...]]. See docs/design/moniker-uri.md for the full grammar.

Visibility.description: Superset of all language visibilities. Per-language profiles restrict the accepted subset.

kind.description: Structural kind of the symbol. Restricted by the per-language profile. Must agree with the last segment kind of `moniker` (enforced by the constructor, not the schema).

parent.description: Moniker of the parent symbol. Must be `root` or another symbol declared in this spec.

signature.description: Type-only normalized signature, e.g. '(string, number): boolean'. Use '_' to mark a slot with no type annotation. Optional.

from.description: Moniker of the source symbol. Must be a symbol declared in this spec.

kind.description: Canonical edge alphabet. Maps to REF_IMPORTS_MODULE / REF_CALLS / REF_DI_REGISTER / REF_DI_REQUIRE at build time.

to.description: Moniker of the target symbol. May reference symbols outside this spec (existence is not checked).

TsProfile.description: TypeScript / JavaScript / TSX / JSX. `module` visibility covers symbols exported from a module without being publicly re-exported (e.g. internal helpers).

JavaProfile.description: Java. Default top-level visibility is `package`; default member visibility is `private`.

PythonProfile.description: Python. Visibility is conventional (`_`-prefix = private; `module` covers nested-but-exported names).

GoProfile.description: Go. Visibility is determined by capitalization (`Foo` = public, `foo` = module-private). Tagged `module` to align with the cross-language vocabulary; functionally equivalent to Go's `package` scope.

CsProfile.description: C#. Default top-level visibility is `internal`; default member visibility is `private`. The wire byte for `internal` is `package` to share the cross-language vocabulary.

SqlProfile.description: SQL / PL-pgSQL. Visibility is not a SQL concept and is ignored by the constructor.
